description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow surrounded by a dense ring of trees, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The building features a dark gray exterior with a prominent gable roof and large, symmetrical windows on both floors. The front entrance is accessible via a short walkway, flanked by landscaped greenery and a driveway with a parked car. The rear and sides of the bungalow are similarly bordered by trees, providing a natural barrier and enhancing privacy. The roof appears to be made of metal or composite panels, and the windows are large, likely double-glazed for insulation. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-urban environment with a focus on comfort and integration with nature.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a dark gray exterior, gable roof, and large symmetrical windows, surrounded by a dense ring of trees and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement, framed by a dense semicircle of trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, the sloped gable roof, and the continuation of the tree barrier.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and the full enclosure of trees around the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, roof slope, and the driveway extending along the side of the house.
